objective: Perform the RC-07 residual JIT disposition after F-0148 closeout: independently verify that F-0154 and F-0158 no longer have a static product failure path on current master, classify only legacy-data backfill and browser/runtime acceptance as explicit runtime holds outside the static P1 queue, close the RC-07 static queue, and preserve RC-08 as the next product anchor without changing product code.
blockedFiles: all product source and product test edits

schema/migration source or execution, real database/data, permission/authorization, Provider/external service, dependency, secret/env, deployment, PR, force-push, non-canonical remote, Minimal Safety Kernel, guard/smoke, Subagent, or any finding outside F-0154 and F-0158

preRedImpactScan.authoritativeChain: current RC-07 state and completed task evidence -> F-0154 formal metadata, generated-label confirmation and source resolution tests -> F-0158 server-owned revision, citation and organization handoff tests -> independent runtime-hold disposition -> RC-08 resume anchor
preRedImpactScan.bundleDisposition: one state-only RC residual review with independent F-0154 and F-0158 acceptance evidence; no shared product implementation or combined finding closure

evidence: formal question difficulty is canonical and legacy-nullable, selected public ids are preserved, generated labels require exact server-authorized confirmation, immutable paper and training snapshots retain hierarchy, and production source resolution no longer accepts caller-supplied metadata maps
legacy null metadata is explicit unavailable or observable same-scope degradation and cannot masquerade as exact, descendant, or nearby
independentDispositions.runtimeHold: legacy production data backfill or acceptance against migrated real data requires separately authorized migration execution and real-data decision
independentDispositions.runtimeHoldReason: the original finding's static failure path is removed; the remaining question is external deployment/data state, not missing product code

evidence: authorized content history reopens a server-owned append-only current revision, supports optimistic edit and exact revision-bound adoption, and exposes only a bounded citation projection
authorized organization history renders the persisted full draft before identity-only copy and opens the exact returned draft through the existing scoped training editor
independentDispositions.runtimeHold: browser and cross-device runtime acceptance remains outside the static P1 program and requires an explicitly authorized runtime session
independentDispositions.runtimeHoldReason: the original blind-adoption and static-label product paths are removed in code and direct tests; only environment runtime proof remains

acceptance: F-0148 closeout is recorded with commit 3fcd499db02c28fbc362b1921f8ddea40293a531 and clean synchronized master evidence
F-0154 and F-0158 each retain independent evidence and an explicit non-product runtime hold; neither is closed merely because it shares RC-07
no current-master static product path reproduces the original F-0154 metadata-loss or F-0158 blind-review failure mode
legacy data is never fabricated or silently backfilled and runtime acceptance is not misrepresented as executed
RC-07 static queue completes and RC-08 becomes the next JIT product anchor
no product source, product test, schema, dependency, permission, Provider, mechanism, historical evidence or audit file changes

conditions: actual diff is limited to the three state files
focused characterization, state parse, format, diff and main-thread adversarial review are GREEN
no product, schema, database, permission, Provider, dependency, mechanism or runtime action occurs
